description: Bounded marketing/commerce funnel stage templates. funnel_edges() draws DECOMPOSES_INTO {relation: funnel} between ADJACENT, SAME-SCOPE stage metrics (confidence 0.85, review-only). A downstream stage decomposes onto the upstream stage that feeds it (e.g. clicks <- impressions). Resolution is same-scope only; an adjacent stage that resolves to no same-scope live Metric is skipped + logged. Funnel edges are templates, NOT asserted causality — they go to the review queue.
